spec_match.rationale: Covers the getPredictedEvents() side of the spec change with a record/replay pattern.

interactive.rationale: Real draw canvas, replay canvas, predicted trail extrapolation.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now includes a deterministic untrusted PointerEvent probe and replay table that compare recorded and replayed offsetX/Y values for coalesced and predicted sub-events.

design_system.rationale: Canvas drawing colors are read from --text-black, --accent-blue, and --accent-emerald via getComputedStyle; the probe table uses existing border, background, and status tokens.

summary: Chrome DevTools MCP pre-fix verification found no offset probe/table and raw canvas hex literals. The repaired page adds a deterministic untrusted dispatch probe plus recorded replay comparisons for offsetX/Y preservation, and the feature conformance suite now asserts original offsets survive dispatch for both coalescedEvents and predictedEvents.
